title: livespec_config
description: Schema for the project's `.livespec.jsonc` configuration file. All fields are optional; absence of the file or any field is equivalent to its documented default.

template.description: Active template — built-in name (e.g. 'livespec', 'livespec-with-diagrams', 'minimal') or path-as-string to a custom template directory relative to the project root.

template_format_version.description: Expected template format version. Doctor's `template-version-matches` check validates that the template's own `template_format_version` equals this value.

post_step_skip_doctor_llm_objective_chec.description: When true, post-step doctor (run automatically after seed/propose-change/critique/revise) skips the LLM-driven objective-checks phase.

post_step_skip_doctor_llm_subjective_che.description: When true, post-step doctor skips the LLM-driven subjective-checks phase.

pre_step_skip_static_checks.description: When true, sub-commands skip the pre-step static check. Intended for emergency recovery only; the skill MUST narrate a warning every time pre-step is skipped.

render_commands.description: Per contracts.md §".livespec.jsonc render-commands shape": maps each diagram-source kind to the argv-form command livespec invokes during revise to render that source. Each value is an array of strings forming a complete argv; the strings `{source}` and `{output_dir}` are substituted literally (project-root-relative paths) before invocation. The command runs with cwd at the project root; non-zero exit fails the revise. REQUIRED iff the active template's manifest declares any `diagram_source` entry — the cross-config consistency invariant is enforced by a doctor static check, NOT by this schema (JSON Schema cannot reach across config files).

diagram_source.description: argv-form render command for `kind: diagram_source` files. Example: ["plantuml", "-tsvg", "-o", "{output_dir}", "{source}"].
